description: Paper 3 corpus basis: canonical fact keys, kinds, tier, bodies, and typed edges after Phase 1. To replicate on another instance: create three empty projects, copy corpus bodies/keys into Spirl (or restore from backup), set projects.* in .spirl/config.json to the new UUIDs, then run scripts/paper3_phase1_mcp_run.py. Diff this file between runs to verify only project_id changed.

facts.body: GET /dbt/v1/runs/{id}/artifacts — manifest and run results.
POST /dbt/v1/jobs/run — trigger job for tag or model subset.
POST /dev/v1/sync — request dev schema sync from prod (masked).
GET /dev/v1/sync/{id} — sync job progress.
Internal: produce to validated topics with schema registry check.
POST /lineage/v1/events — ingest OpenLineage event batch.
GET /metadata/v1/glossary — business terms and linked columns.
GET /metadata/v1/search — search tables and columns by tag.
GET /pipeline/v1/metrics/prometheus — internal metrics scrape.
POST /ops/v1/backfills — request approval workflow id.
GET /ops/v1/backfills/{id} — approval and execution state.
GET /pipeline/v1/costs — allocation by DAG and task.
GET /pipeline/v1/datasets/{id}/lineage — upstream/downstream.
POST /pipeline/v1/datasets — register dataset metadata.
GET /pipeline/v1/quality/{run_id} — GE results summary.
POST /pipeline/v1/runs/{id}/cancel — cancel queued or running DAG run.
GET /pipeline/v1/runs/{id} — state, task instances, logs URI.
POST /pipeline/v1/runs — trigger DAG with conf JSON.
GET /pipeline/v1/audit/export — export access logs for tenant.
POST /warehouse/v1/query/{id}/cancel — cancel running query.
POST /warehouse/v1/query — async query with warehouse selection.
GET /warehouse/v1/tables/{name}/stats — row count, freshness.
Ad hoc queries over USD 50 require analyst approval ticket.
Weekly logical export of gold marts to immutable bucket.
No circular dependencies between gold marts; enforced in manifest lint.
Max 200 tasks per DAG; split otherwise.
Exports for ML limited to approved feature sets.
No single dbt model > 2h runtime without incremental strategy.
TLS between all services; no plaintext JDBC.
Default topic retention 7d; extended only with approval.
Data platform on-call 24/5; weekend only during freeze windows.
All PII columns must have classification tag before merge to main.
Monthly Snowflake credit budget; throttle heavy ad hoc queries.
All Kafka producers must register schema before first publish.
Backfills require ticket; max 90d window per run without arch review.
Airflow tasks use deterministic run_id + data interval for idempotency.
PII columns must appear in lineage with masking policy reference.
Bronze raw, silver conformed, gold curated marts; no skips.
Date partition on all large tables; cluster on tenant where applicable.
Tokenize PII in silver; only hashed keys in gold unless approved.
Bronze 2y; silver 5y; gold indefinite with legal hold support.
Backward compatible Avro for Kafka; compatibility CI gate.
Streaming lag p95 under 2 minutes; batch daily by 08:00 UTC.
Prod data never lands in dev; synthetic or masked only.
Airflow deployed via official Helm chart; IRSA for S3 access.
dbt run --select state:modified+ in PR CI on clone warehouse.
Kafka and Airflow control plane multi-AZ; workers spread across AZs.
BI tools pinned to read replica; no queries on primary.
Quarterly rotation of warehouse service accounts.
Snowflake RBAC mapped from corporate IdP groups.
Statistical anomaly jobs on KPI streams; optional ML model.
Column-level lineage from dbt exposures to BI dashboards.
Per-pipeline dollar cost estimates in lineage graph.
Monthly chargeback report per domain owner from warehouse tags.
Approved datasets replicated to EU bucket for GDPR analysis.
Nightly refresh of revenue and churn marts with data quality gates.
YAML contracts for gold tables enforced in CI.
Single pane for failed expectations and blocking downstream.
dbt incremental models for large fact tables.
Airflow SLA misses page data platform on-call.
Query guardrails in BI tool to require partition filters.
Row-level sampling with PII redaction for analyst sandbox.
Dev environments seeded from anonymized production sample.
Type-2 SCD snapshots for slowly changing dimensions.
15-minute rolling aggregates for funnel metrics.
Snowflake time travel 7d for operational recovery drills.
Dual-write to new cluster for 2 weeks; consumer offset validation.
Oracle EDW sunset; parallel run 60d with reconciliation reports.
Detect spend spikes vs 4-week rolling average.
Week-over-week DAG duration anomaly detection.
Freshness checks on gold tables; page if > 1h late.
Consumer lag alerts with topic-level thresholds.
Baseline snapshot: 93 facts, kinds: api_endpoint=22, constraint=12, decision=10, deployment=5, feature=17, migration=2, monitoring=4, stack=14, test=7, pre-existing conflicts resolved: 0

Glue Data Catalog as secondary; Snowflake external tables for curated zones.
EMR on-demand for large backfills; auto-terminate idle.
Cloudability dashboards; chargeback tags per cost center.
Fivetran for Salesforce and Postgres CDC mirrors (read replicas).
Iceberg tables on S3 for near-real-time marts; Athena for ad hoc.
S3 landing zone; AWS Glue crawlers for schema inference.
Kafka cluster (MSK) for clickstream and product events.
OpenLineage events from Airflow and dbt; Marquez UI.
DataHub for glossary, ownership, and PII tags.
Apache Airflow 3 on Kubernetes; CeleryExecutor for heavy tasks.
Great Expectations checkpoints on critical marts; alerts to Slack.
Airflow SLA sensors on gold marts with downstream pause.
dbt Core in CI; dbt Cloud for scheduling prod models.
Snowflake shared database; separate dev/test warehouses.
Automated scan for unexpected PII patterns in bronze.
dbt unit tests for critical business logic macros.
Quarterly restore test from backup to isolated account.
Nightly job asserts OpenLineage coverage > 95% for gold.
Post-deploy smoke DAG validating row counts vs baseline.
Daily reconciliation between source totals and gold fact tables.
Automated compare between landed and expected schemas.
POST /v1/alerts — create alert rule with channels.
GET /v1/audit — paginated audit events with filters.
POST /v1/auth/session/refresh — rotate refresh token.
GET /v1/billing/usage — current period usage vs plan limits.
POST /v1/dashboards — create dashboard from template or blank.
GET /v1/dashboards — list dashboards for workspace.
GET /v1/datasets — curated datasets available to workspace.
GET /v1/datasets/{id}/preview — sample rows and schema.
GET /v1/exports/{job_id} — status and download URL when ready.
POST /v1/flags/evaluate — batch flag evaluation for user context.
GET /v1/health — liveness for load balancers.
POST /v1/integrations/slack/oauth — connect Slack workspace.
POST /v1/metrics/export — async export job; poll job status.
POST /v1/metrics/query — query time-series with filters and granularity.
POST /v1/reports/schedule — cron expression and delivery list.
POST /v1/sql/run — read-only query with row and time limits.
PATCH /v1/tenant/settings — workspace name, branding, retention.
POST /v1/users/invite — email invite with role assignment.
GET /v1/version — build sha and supported API versions.
POST /v1/webhooks — register endpoint URL and event types.
Quarterly access review for admin roles; auto-revoke inactive 90d.
Monthly infra cap USD 18k until Series A; require approval to exceed.
EU tenants data in eu-central-1; no replication outside region.
p95 API latency under 300ms for standard queries at P50 load.
No Salesforce integration in v1; HubSpot read-only optional.
HSTS, CSP, and X-Frame-Options required on all web routes.
Engineering team capped at 12 FTE for 2026; contractor budget 20%.
New vendor review required; no sub-processors without DPA.
MVP GA target 2026-06-30; beta starts 2026-04-01.
99.9% API SLO; planned maintenance max 4h per quarter with notice.
URL path versioning /v1, /v2; deprecation headers and 6-month sunset.
Bill on active seats + monthly tracked events over included quota.
SOC2 Type I in progress; GDPR DPA template; HIPAA not targeted.
Hot 90d in OLTP; cold archive to R2 with 7-year option for enterprise.
Default CSV and Parquet; Excel only on Enterprise plan.
PostHog flags; kill switches for risky releases; no client-side secrets.
EN first; i18n framework ready; DE and FR by Q3.
Responsive web only for 2026; native apps out of scope.
Row-level tenancy via tenant_id on all tenant-scoped tables; no schema-per-tenant.
Classify columns; mask in logs; DSR export and delete workflows.
SSE for dashboard tiles; WebSockets only for collaborative editing (future).
99.9% API monthly; status page; incident comms within 30 minutes.
Fly.io machines in ord and fra; autoscale on CPU and request rate.
Ephemeral env per PR with seeded demo data.
Supabase migration pipeline; expand/contract for zero-downtime.
Vercel production + preview; protected main branch; canary 10% on API.
Threshold and anomaly alerts with Slack and email channels.
Public REST API with scoped API keys and per-key rate limits.
Immutable audit trail for admin actions and data exports.
Self-serve plan changes, invoices, and payment methods via Stripe portal.
In-app changelog and opt-in beta features per workspace.
Configurable analytics dashboard with saved views and sharing.
Signed embed tokens for customer-facing charts in partner portals.
OKR-style goals linked to metrics and weekly check-ins.
CSV and warehouse connectors with column mapping and validation.
Installable PWA with offline cached list views.
Roles: Owner, Admin, Analyst, Viewer; custom roles on Enterprise.
Scheduled PDF and email reports with filters and drill-down links.
Isolated sandbox project for API integration testing.
Global search across dashboards, reports, and documentation.
Read-only SQL against curated datasets for power users.
SAML SSO with IdP metadata upload and JIT provisioning.
Workspace teams with inherited permissions and shared assets.
Outbound webhooks with signing secret, retries, and dead-letter queue.
Dual-run JWT validation during auth provider migration window.
One-time import tool from competitor CSV exports; idempotent keys.
Monthly error budget policy; freeze features if exhausted.
PagerDuty rotation; runbooks in Notion; blameless postmortems.
Grafana dashboard for golden signals and burn rates.
Baseline snapshot: 90 facts, kinds: api_endpoint=20, constraint=10, decision=12, deployment=4, feature=18, migration=2, monitoring=3, stack=15, test=6, pre-existing conflicts resolved: 0

PostHog self-hosted EU for product analytics and feature flags.
Supabase Auth with JWT, optional SSO via SAML for enterprise tenants.
Node.js 22 LTS, Fastify 5, Zod validation, Pino logging.
Redis 7 for session cache, rate-limit counters, and job dedupe keys.
GitHub Actions: lint, test, typecheck, preview deploys, production promote.
PostgreSQL 16 on Supabase, pgvector for semantic search on help docs.
Resend for transactional; Postmark backup for critical billing emails.
Next.js 15 App Router, React 19, TypeScript strict, Tailwind CSS 4, TanStack Query.
Vercel for web, Fly.io for API workers, Cloudflare for CDN and WAF.
OpenTelemetry traces to Honeycomb; metrics in Grafana Cloud.
Stripe Billing: subscriptions, usage meters, customer portal.
BullMQ on Redis for async exports, webhook delivery, and digest emails.
Algolia for in-app doc search; Postgres full-text for internal admin.
Doppler for env sync; no secrets in repo; rotation quarterly.
S3-compatible R2 for user-uploaded CSV previews and export archives.
axe-core in CI on main flows; WCAG 2.1 AA target.
Pact consumer tests for public API; provider verification in CI.
Playwright smoke on staging for login, dashboard load, export flow.
k6 scripts for read-heavy paths before major marketing launches.
Semgrep + npm audit in CI; annual pentest.
Vitest for frontend and backend units; 80% line coverage gate on critical paths.
GET /admin/v1/clients — list OAuth clients (admin only).
POST /admin/v1/clients/{id}/rotate-secret — rotate client secret.
GET /healthz — liveness; no auth.
GET /readyz — checks DB, Redis, NATS connectivity.
POST /internal/v1/accounts — provision tenant; idempotent.
POST /internal/v1/tokens — issue scoped token for worker.
GET /metrics — Prometheus scrape endpoint internal only.
GET /v1/openapi.json — machine-readable spec.
GET /docs — Swagger UI behind auth in non-prod.
GET /v1/batch/{job_id} — job status and result URLs.
POST /v1/batch — submit batch job; returns job_id.
HEAD /v1/resources — count-only for sync clients.
GET /v1/metrics/summary — weekly usage rollup for dashboards.
GET /v1/quota — remaining quota for caller.
GET /v1/resources — list resources for caller scope.
DELETE /v1/resources/{id} — soft delete; tombstone header.
GET /v1/resources/{id} — fetch single resource.
PATCH /v1/resources/{id} — partial update with ETag.
POST /v1/resources — create resource; returns 201 + Location.
POST /v1/usage/events — ingest usage events (batched).
GET /v1/webhooks/deliveries — list recent delivery attempts.
POST /v1/webhooks/deliveries/{id}/retry — manual retry.
No more than 3 active deprecated paths per major version.
RPO 15 minutes for primary DB; daily full backup retained 30d.
Default 1000 RPS per client; burst 2000.
No secret material in query strings or access logs.
Critical CVE patch within 7 days; others monthly.
All disks and object storage encrypted; CMK optional enterprise.
p99 internal RPC under 50ms between zone-local services.
Access logs 400d; debug logs 14d in non-prod only.
Critical API team 24/7 during launch month only.
Max request body 10MB unless signed multipart upload.
Runbook for regional failover; RTO target 4 hours.
Staging uses synthetic fixtures only; no production PII.
OAuth2 client credentials for M2M; JWT for user delegation with audience checks.
Deprecation calendar in changelog; min 90d notice for removals.
Strict allowlist of origins per client; no wildcard in production.
RFC 7807 problem+json with stable type URIs and correlation id.
All mutating endpoints accept Idempotency-Key; 24h dedupe window.
Cursor-based pagination for large collections; max page size 100.
Per client_id and per IP; burst + sustained token bucket.
Hard 30s gateway timeout; async pattern for long jobs.
Header Accept-Version optional; path /v1 default for 12 months.
HMAC-SHA256 on webhook bodies; clock skew window 5 minutes.
Blue/green for gateway config; gradual pod rollouts for services.
Automated metric comparison before full promotion.
Monthly GKE cost alert at 85% of budget.
Kubernetes Job for goose migrations with advisory locks.
Default deny K8s network policy; explicit allow per namespace.
Admin API for key lifecycle and security event replay.
Scoped API keys with rotation, last-used timestamp, and parent client.
Batch job API with chunked uploads and completion webhooks.
Per-dependency circuit breakers with half-open probes.
Generated TypeScript and Go SDKs from OpenAPI with semver.
DLQ topic for failed consumer messages with replay tooling.
Read path fallback to cache when primary DB unhealthy.
Aggregated health checks across dependencies for synthetic probes.
Optional IP allowlists per API client for enterprise.
Breaking change detection between OpenAPI versions in CI.
Central quota service enforcing plan limits across edge and core.
Optional HMAC request signing for high-security partners.
JSON Schema validation at gateway and service boundary.
Exponential backoff with jitter; max 5 retries for 5xx.
AsyncAPI and OpenAPI registry with diff and compatibility checks.
Shadow traffic to new versions without affecting billing.
Weighted routing between service versions for canary.
Emitted usage events to billing pipeline with at-least-once delivery.
Dual-write window max 14 days during datastore migration.
Strangler pattern: extract quota and auth to dedicated services.
Severity-based routing to Slack vs PagerDuty.
99.95% availability SLO for public read endpoints.
Synthetic checks every 60s from three regions.
Tail-based sampling for error traces; 1% baseline happy path.
Baseline snapshot: 94 facts, kinds: api_endpoint=22, constraint=12, decision=10, deployment=5, feature=18, migration=2, monitoring=4, stack=14, test=7, pre-existing conflicts resolved: 0

JSON logs with trace_id, span_id, tenant_id, client_id on every line.
